case_title: CORA MAN-HA FOLK VS. BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLK, CORA MAN-HA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOLK, CORA MAN-HA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $6,576.90 PRINCIPAL, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,697.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
